user.title: Zigporter Setup
user.description: Configure the Zigbee backend for the network map.

data_description.backend: Select which Zigbee integration to use for topology data.

error.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration is not set up. Zigbee2MQTT requires MQTT.
error.zha_not_configured: ZHA integration is not set up.

data_description.backend: Switch between Zigbee2MQTT and ZHA without reinstalling.
data_description.warn_lqi: Links below this LQI are shown in yellow.
data_description.critical_lqi: Links below this LQI are shown in red.
data_description.cache_ttl: How long to cache the network map before re-scanning (0 = no cache).
data_description.scan_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for a network scan to complete.
data_description.hop_color_1: Background color for the first hop ring (RRGGBB or #RRGGBB). Set all 4 or leave all empty for defaults.
data_description.hop_color_2: Background color for the second hop ring (RRGGBB or #RRGGBB). Set all 4 or leave all empty for defaults.
data_description.hop_color_3: Background color for the third hop ring (RRGGBB or #RRGGBB). Set all 4 or leave all empty for defaults.
data_description.hop_color_4: Background color for the fourth hop ring (RRGGBB or #RRGGBB). Set all 4 or leave all empty for defaults.
data_description.hop_opacity: Opacity of hop ring fills (0.1–1.0). Default: 0.80.

error.incomplete_palette: All 4 hop colors must be set, or leave all empty for defaults.
